name: aiarmada/events
description: Reusable Laravel event domain, scheduling, attendance, and optional commerce integration for AIArmada applications

suggest.aiarmada/products: Enables product and variant relationships for event definitions and occurrences.
suggest.aiarmada/customers: Enables customer-backed purchasers and participants for registrations.
suggest.aiarmada/orders: Enables order-item fulfillment and event order completion sync.
suggest.aiarmada/checkout: Enables cart and checkout orchestration for ticket purchasing.
